member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Utilities.Constants
member.summary: The see> class contains static / constant properties to simplify and centralise various settings

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Utilities.Constants.WebDeserialisationSettings
member.summary: Returns an instance of configured with the Web defaults

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Utilities.EncryptionExtensions
member.summary: The class contains extension methods to encrypt / decrypt the specified string

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.EncryptionExtensions.Encrypt(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The Encrypt extension method will encrypt the specified string (using AES encryption)
member.param: The string to encrypt
The optional key to use for the encryption. If supplied, it must be 16, 24, or 32 bytes long. If not specified, an internal default (32 bytes) will be used
The optional iv (initialisation vector) to use for the decryption. If supplied, it must be 16 bytes long. If not specified, an internal default will be used
member.returns: The original string encrypted appropriately

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.EncryptionExtensions.Decrypt(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The Decrypt extension method will encrypt the specified string (using AES encryption)
member.param: The string to decrypt
The optional key to use for the encryption. If supplied, it must be 16, 24, or 32 bytes long. If not specified, an internal default (32 bytes) will be used
The optional iv (initialisation vector) to use for the decryption. If supplied, it must be 16 bytes long. If not specified, an internal default will be used
member.returns: The decrypted string

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.EnumExtensions.ParseEnum``1(System.String)
member.summary: The ParseEnum method will parse the supplied string and return the matching enum value
member.typeparam: The typeof of the expected enum
member.param: The value to parse to the enum
member.returns: The parsed value as the matching enum value
member.exception: Thrown when the string is not a valid enum value

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.IntParser.ToInt(System.String)
member.summary: The ToInt method will parse the supplied string and return the matching int value
member.param: The value to parse to the int
member.returns: The parsed value as the matching int value
member.exception: Thrown when the string is not a valid int value

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.IntParser.ToIntSafe(System.String)
member.summary: The ToIntSafe method will parse the supplied string and return the matching int value, or 0 if the string is not a valid int value
member.param: The value to parse to the int
member.returns: The parsed value as the matching int value, or 0 if the string is not a valid int value

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.LinqExtensions.ForEachAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Awaits the supplied asynchronous action once per item, strictly sequentially, so no two invocations ever run concurrently.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Utilities.ObjectExtensions
member.summary: The class contains some useful methods to enable various tasks to be performed in a more fluid, English sentence, style

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.ObjectExtensions.ToJson``1(``0)
member.summary: The ToJson method, as you might expect, converts the supplied object to its JSON equivalent (using the JsonSerializerDefaults.Web defaults with WriteIndented set to true)
member.param: The object to convert to JSON
member.returns: The JSON string of the object supplied

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Utilities.PathOperationExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for common path operations.
member.remarks: This class includes methods that enhance the functionality of string paths, such as safely combining multiple segments while preventing rooted paths from overriding the base path.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.PathOperationExtensions.CombinePath(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Combines a base path with one or more relative segments while preventing rooted segments from overriding earlier parts.
member.param: The starting path to append segments to.
The path segments to append. All segments must be relative.
member.returns: The combined path.
member.exception: Thrown when any segment is rooted.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.RegexExtensions.LowercaseLettersRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[a-z]
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [a-z].

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.RegexExtensions.UppercaseLettersRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[A-Z]
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z].

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.RegexExtensions.DigitRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[0-9]
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [0-9].

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.RegexExtensions.SpecialCharacterRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[!-\\/:-@[-`¬{-~]
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [!-/:-@[-`{-~\u00AC].

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions
member.summary: The class contains some useful methods to enable checks to be performed in a more fluid, English sentence, style

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.IsNull(System.String)
member.summary: The IsNull method, as you might expect, checks whether the string is, in fact, null
member.param: The string to check for being null
member.returns: True if the string is null, False otherwise

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.IsNotNull(System.String)
member.summary: The IsNotNull method, as you might expect, checks whether the string is not null
member.param: The string to check for being not null
member.returns: True if the string is not null, False otherwise

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(System.String)
member.summary: The IsNullOrWhiteSpace method, as you might expect, checks whether the string is, in fact, null, empty or whitespace
member.param: The string to check for being null, empty or whitespace
member.returns: True if the string is null, empty or whitespace, False otherwise

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.IsNotNullOrWhiteSpace(System.String)
member.summary: The IsNotNullOrWhiteSpace method, as you might expect, checks whether the string is not null, empty or whitespace
member.param: The string to check for being not null, empty or whitespace
member.returns: True if the string is not null, empty or whitespace, False otherwise

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.FromJson``1(System.String)
member.summary: The FromJson method, as you might expect, converts the supplied JSON to the specified object
member.typeparam: The required type of the object to deserialise to
member.param: The JSON representation of the object
member.returns: A deserialised object based on the original JSON

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.FromJson``1(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: The FromJson method, as you might expect, converts the supplied JSON to the specified object
member.typeparam: The required type of the object to deserialise to
member.param: The JSON representation of the object
Allows the specific options to be set to control deserialisation
member.returns: A deserialised object based on the original JSON

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.TruncateIfRequired(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: The TruncateIfRequired method will, as the name suggests, truncate the string if the length exceeds the specified length
member.param: The raw string to potentially truncate
The maximum length the string should be truncated to if required
member.returns: The specified string or the truncated version

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.RemoveTrailing(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The RemoveTrailing method will, as the name suggests, remove the specified character from the end if it exists
member.param: The raw string to potentially remove the trailing character from
The character to remove from the end if it exists
member.returns: The original or updated string

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.SanitizeFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: The SanitizeFilePath method replaces invalid or undesirable characters in a file path with a space character to ensure a clean and sanitized string representation of the path.
member.param: The JSON representation of the object
member.returns: A sanitized version of the file path with specified characters replaced by spaces

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.NormalizeLinux(System.String)
member.summary: The NormalizeLinux method normalizes a file path to a Linux-style format by replacing backslashes with forward slashes,
member.param: The file path to normalize
member.returns: The normalized file path, prefixed with a forward slash if not already prefixed

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.NormalizeWindows(System.String)
member.summary: The NormalizeWindows method normalizes a file path to a Windows-style format by replacing forward slashes with backslashes,
member.param: The file path to normalize
member.returns: The normalized file path, prefixed with a backslash if not already prefixed

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.FileSizeToText(System.Int64)
member.summary: The FileSizeText method converts a file size in bytes to a human-readable string format (B, KB, MB).
member.param: The file size in bytes (represented as a long integer)
member.returns: The human-readable string format

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Utilities.StringExtensions.ToTitleCase(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The TitleCased method converts a string to title case using the specified culture.
member.param: The string to convert
The culture to use for title casing
member.returns: The title-cased string

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.LowercaseLettersRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the LowercaseLettersRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.LowercaseLettersRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.LowercaseLettersRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.LowercaseLettersRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.LowercaseLettersRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.LowercaseLettersRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.LowercaseLettersRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.LowercaseLettersRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_nonAscii_8CD7FC6D8414F97879531EB4BA8F837AAE4E0F47B7968451545B13CB721CD784
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "!\"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\\]^_`{|}~¬".
